name: antonioturdo/json-schema-generator
description: A modular, decoupled JSON Schema generator for PHP 8.1+

suggest.phpdocumentor/reflection-docblock: Allows extracting types and descriptions from DocBlocks using PhpDocumentorEnricher
suggest.phpstan/phpdoc-parser: Advanced PHPDoc parsing for shaped arrays and complex generics using PhpStanEnricher
suggest.symfony/property-info: Allows extracting types and descriptions using SymfonyPhpDocPropertyEnricher
suggest.symfony/error-handler: Allows SerializerPropertyEnricher to map FlattenException values like Symfony's ProblemNormalizer
suggest.symfony/serializer: Allows using #[SerializedName] and NameConverters with SerializerPropertyEnricher
suggest.symfony/translation-contracts: Allows SerializerPropertyEnricher to map TranslatableInterface values like Symfony's TranslatableNormalizer
suggest.symfony/uid: Allows SerializerPropertyEnricher to map Symfony Uuid/Ulid values like Symfony's UidNormalizer
suggest.symfony/validator: Allows extracting JSON Schema constraints from Symfony Validation attributes
